---
title: "Intelligent 3D Graph Exploration with Time-Travel Features"
author:
  - name: Peter Kapec
  - name: Michal Paprčka
  - name: Adam Pažitnaj
date: "2012-09-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  doi: "10.1007/978-3-642-33564-8_14"
  url: "https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-642-33564-8_14"
  isbn: "978-3-642-33563-1"
  page: "113-120"
---

## Links

[DOI: 10.1007/978-3-642-33564-8_14](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-642-33564-8_14)
